nasb.text: Whoever exalts himself shall be humbled; and whoever humbles himself shall be exalted.

esv.text: Whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and whoever humbles himself will be exalted.

cnv.text: 凡高抬自己的，必被降卑；凡自己謙卑的，必被升高。

ccb.text: 自高的人必遭贬抑，谦卑的人必得尊荣。

csbs.text: 因为凡是自我高举的都会被降卑，而自我降卑的都会被高举。
